---
title: "tmp_scan.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tmp_scan.ts"
loc: 12
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.25
style_score: 7.11
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 5.90
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 7.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 3 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [runScan](file://./src/tools/pennyone/index.js)
- [*](file://path)

### Exports
- `main`
- `target`
